title: AgentMaestro Workflow Definition
description: Validates the AgentMaestro workflow YAML structure once converted to JSON.

name.description: Human readable name displayed in dashboards and logs.

description.description: Optional summary presented to workflow authors.

config.description: Workflow-wide configuration map applied to every task.

on_error.description: Global failure strategy selected for the workflow.

tasks.description: Ordered list of tasks executed sequentially or in parallel.

Identifier.description: Slug identifier used for dependency references.

agent.description: Agent identifier defined in repository configuration.

task.description: Payload delivered to the selected agent using the A2A protocol.

inputs.description: Declarative inputs required before the task is executed.

depends_on.description: Optional list of prerequisite task identifiers.

execution.description: Overrides for timeout and retry behaviour.

artifacts.description: Artifacts that must be available before the task runs.

InputArtifactReference.description: Reference to an artifact emitted by an upstream task.

from.description: Identifier of the upstream task that produced the artifact.

artifactId.description: Artifact identifier declared on the producing task.

timeout.description: Seconds allowed for the task to run before a timeout is raised.

retry.description: Retry policy that overrides the workflow default.

attempts.description: Maximum number of attempts including the original execution.

backoff.description: Retry backoff strategy applied between attempts.

delay_seconds.description: Delay in seconds between retry attempts when applicable.
